subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! How can I make mention of Thee with the pen, when Thou hast sanctified Thine Essence above the allusions of eternity, and how [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی کیف اذکرک بالقلم بعد تنزیهک نفسک عن اشارات القدم و کیف
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @chastisement and requital, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
